title: skillsdeck skill metadata
description: Platform metadata for a single skillsdeck skill. Lives at skills/<name>/skill.json, alongside the Agent Skill's SKILL.md. Fields here power the catalog, search, and the CLI; they do not change how an agent reads the skill.

name.description: Skill identifier. MUST equal the folder name and the SKILL.md frontmatter name.

description.description: One-line summary for the catalog and search. Keep it concise; the full trigger description lives in SKILL.md.

category.description: Primary category from the skillsdeck taxonomy.

version.description: Semantic version. Bump on any change to the skill's content.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for the skill's content (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0, CC-BY-4.0).

tags.description: Free-form keywords used for search and filtering.

homepage.description: Optional link to fuller documentation or the skill's source.

compatibility.description: Optional minimum agent version the skill expects, e.g. ">=1.0.0" (interpreted by Claude Code).
